title: Project Management (EPCM/EPC)
description: Comprehensive Engineering, Procurement, Construction Management (EPCM) and Engineering, Procurement & Construction (EPC) solutions for industrial, commercial, and infrastructure projects, ensuring quality, safety, timely delivery, and cost efficiency.
overview: Our Project Management (EPCM/EPC) services cover every phase of the project lifecycle, from engineering and procurement to construction, commissioning, and final handover. We ensure seamless coordination, efficient resource management, and successful project execution while maintaining the highest standards of quality and safety.
details: We deliver end-to-end project management solutions for industrial plants, commercial buildings, infrastructure developments, and specialized engineering projects. Our EPCM approach provides expert management of engineering, procurement, and construction activities, while our EPC model offers complete turnkey project execution. With a focus on quality, safety, budget control, and timely completion, we help clients achieve successful project outcomes with minimal risk.

title: Architectural Designing
description: Innovative and functional architectural design solutions for residential, commercial, industrial, and institutional projects. We create sustainable, aesthetically appealing, and space-efficient designs tailored to your vision and requirements.
overview: Our architectural designing services transform ideas into practical and visually stunning spaces. From concept development to detailed construction drawings, we focus on functionality, sustainability, compliance, and modern design principles to deliver exceptional results.
details: We provide comprehensive architectural design services that combine creativity with engineering excellence. Our architects work closely with clients to develop designs that maximize functionality, aesthetics, and long-term value. Whether it's a home, office, industrial facility, educational institution, or mixed-use development, we deliver detailed architectural solutions that meet your budget, project goals, and regulatory requirements.

title: 3D Visualization & Engineering Design
description: Professional 2D drafting, 3D visualization, BIM modeling, structural analysis, and engineering design services using industry-leading software including SketchUp, AutoCAD, Revit (BIM), STAAD.Pro, and ETABS.
overview: We deliver high-quality architectural and engineering visualization services that help clients visualize projects before construction begins. Our team creates precise 2D drawings, realistic 3D models, Building Information Modeling (BIM), and performs advanced structural analysis to ensure safe, efficient, and cost-effective project execution.
process: Final design review and project delivery
details: Our visualization and engineering design services bridge the gap between concept and construction. Using advanced software such as AutoCAD, SketchUp, Revit (BIM), STAAD.Pro, and ETABS, we create accurate architectural drawings, detailed 3D models, intelligent BIM workflows, and perform comprehensive structural analysis. These solutions help clients identify design issues early, improve coordination, reduce project costs, and ensure compliance with engineering standards while delivering visually compelling project presentations.

title: Structural Designing
description: Comprehensive structural design solutions for residential, commercial, industrial, and infrastructure projects, ensuring safety, durability, efficiency, and compliance with national and international design standards.
overview: Our structural designing services focus on creating safe, economical, and high-performance structural systems. We design reinforced concrete (RCC), steel, composite, and foundation structures that withstand environmental and operational loads while optimizing construction costs and ensuring long-term reliability.
process: Project requirement analysis and site evaluation
Detailed RCC and steel structural design
Structural analysis and code compliance verification
Preparation of structural drawings and BOQ
features: Compliance with IS Codes and International Standards
details: We provide complete structural engineering solutions that ensure buildings and infrastructure are safe, stable, and durable. Our experienced structural engineers design RCC, steel, composite, and foundation systems using advanced engineering software and modern design methodologies. Every structure is analyzed for gravity, wind, and seismic loads while maintaining compliance with applicable standards. From concept design to construction support, we deliver reliable structural solutions that optimize material usage, reduce costs, and enhance overall project performance.

title: Auditing, Estimation & Costing
description: Accurate project auditing, quantity estimation, and cost analysis services to ensure financial transparency, budget optimization, and successful project execution for residential, commercial, industrial, and infrastructure developments.
overview: Our Auditing, Estimation & Costing services help clients plan and manage construction projects with confidence. We provide detailed quantity take-offs, cost estimates, project audits, budget planning, and financial evaluations to minimize risks, control expenses, and maximize project value.
process: Preparation of detailed cost estimates and BOQ
Project cost auditing and financial analysis
Final reporting and cost control recommendations
details: We provide professional auditing, estimation, and costing services that enable clients to make informed financial decisions throughout the project lifecycle. Our experts prepare accurate quantity estimates, detailed BOQs, and realistic project budgets while auditing construction costs to identify savings opportunities and ensure financial accountability. By combining technical expertise with cost engineering practices, we help deliver projects on time, within budget, and with complete transparency.

title: Interior Designing & Execution
description: End-to-end interior design and execution services for residential, commercial, hospitality, retail, and office spaces, combining creativity, functionality, and premium craftsmanship to create inspiring interiors.
overview: Our Interior Designing & Execution services transform empty spaces into elegant, functional, and personalized environments. From concept development and space planning to material selection, furniture design, lighting, and complete on-site execution, we deliver interiors that reflect your vision while ensuring quality, comfort, and timely completion.
process: Final inspection, handover, and post-completion support
details: We provide comprehensive interior design and turnkey execution services that blend aesthetics with functionality. Our experienced designers work closely with clients to create customized interior solutions that enhance comfort, productivity, and visual appeal. From concept creation and 3D visualization to procurement, site supervision, and final installation, we manage every aspect of the project with precision, ensuring exceptional craftsmanship, budget control, and on-time delivery.

title: MEP Designing & Execution
description: Comprehensive Mechanical, Electrical, and Plumbing (MEP) design and execution services for residential, commercial, industrial, healthcare, and infrastructure projects, ensuring safety, efficiency, sustainability, and regulatory compliance.
overview: Our MEP Designing & Execution services integrate mechanical, electrical, plumbing, fire protection, and HVAC systems into a coordinated solution that enhances building performance and occupant comfort. From design and planning to installation, testing, and commissioning, we deliver reliable MEP solutions tailored to your project requirements.
process: Project requirement analysis and site assessment
MEP system planning and detailed engineering design
features: Turnkey MEP Execution and Project Management
details: We provide end-to-end MEP engineering solutions that ensure buildings operate safely, efficiently, and sustainably. Our multidisciplinary team designs and executes HVAC, electrical, plumbing, fire protection, and low-voltage systems using modern engineering practices and BIM technology. We focus on seamless coordination between architectural, structural, and MEP disciplines to reduce construction conflicts, optimize costs, improve energy efficiency, and deliver high-quality installations that meet all applicable codes and standards.

title: Solar Plant Designing & Execution
description: End-to-end solar power plant design, engineering, procurement, installation, and commissioning services for residential, commercial, industrial, and utility-scale projects, delivering sustainable and cost-effective energy solutions.
overview: Our Solar Plant Designing & Execution services provide complete EPC solutions for rooftop and ground-mounted solar photovoltaic (PV) systems. From site assessment and system design to installation, testing, and commissioning, we ensure maximum energy generation, long-term reliability, and compliance with industry standards.
process: Site survey and energy requirement analysis
Solar feasibility study and system sizing
Engineering design and electrical layout preparation
Procurement of solar modules, inverters, and BOS components
Performance monitoring, maintenance, and project handover
details: We provide comprehensive Solar EPC services that help clients transition to clean and renewable energy. Our experienced engineers design and execute high-performance solar power plants tailored to your energy requirements and site conditions. Using advanced engineering tools and premium-quality components, we deliver efficient, reliable, and cost-effective solar solutions with a strong focus on safety, sustainability, and long-term performance. From concept to commissioning and ongoing maintenance, we manage every stage of your solar project with precision and expertise.

title: HVAC Designing & Execution
description: Comprehensive Heating, Ventilation, and Air Conditioning (HVAC) design and execution services for residential, commercial, industrial, healthcare, hospitality, and institutional projects, ensuring energy-efficient, comfortable, and sustainable indoor environments.
overview: Our HVAC Designing & Execution services provide complete solutions for climate control systems, from load calculations and duct design to equipment selection, installation, testing, and commissioning. We focus on delivering energy-efficient, reliable, and cost-effective HVAC systems that meet industry standards and client requirements.
process: Site assessment and cooling/heating load calculation
HVAC system planning and detailed engineering design
Ducting, piping, and ventilation layout preparation
Performance evaluation, handover, and maintenance support
features: HVAC Load Calculations and Equipment Selection
details: We deliver end-to-end HVAC engineering solutions designed to provide superior indoor air quality, thermal comfort, and energy efficiency. Our team specializes in designing and executing centralized air conditioning, VRF/VRV systems, ventilation, exhaust, and industrial HVAC solutions using modern engineering practices and international standards. From concept and detailed engineering to installation, testing, commissioning, and maintenance, we ensure every HVAC system operates safely, efficiently, and reliably throughout its lifecycle.

title: Furnace Designing & Execution
description: Comprehensive furnace design, engineering, fabrication, installation, and commissioning services for industrial heating applications. We deliver energy-efficient, reliable, and high-performance furnace solutions tailored to your manufacturing processes.
overview: Our Furnace Designing & Execution services provide complete EPC solutions for industrial furnaces used in steel, foundry, cement, ceramics, glass, forging, heat treatment, and other process industries. From concept and thermal design to fabrication, installation, testing, and commissioning, we ensure safe, efficient, and long-lasting furnace systems.
process: Process requirement analysis and thermal calculations
Selection of refractory materials, burners, and control systems
Operation training, maintenance, and technical support
details: We provide end-to-end furnace engineering and execution services for a wide range of industrial applications. Our experienced engineers design customized furnace systems that maximize thermal efficiency, reduce fuel consumption, and ensure consistent process performance. From engineering and equipment selection to fabrication, installation, commissioning, and after-sales support, we deliver reliable furnace solutions that comply with industry standards while improving productivity, operational safety, and long-term cost efficiency.

title: Clean Room Partition
description: Professional clean room partition design, supply, and installation services for pharmaceutical, healthcare, biotechnology, electronics, food processing, and industrial facilities, ensuring contamination control and compliance with clean room standards.
overview: Our Clean Room Partition services provide customized modular partition systems that create controlled environments with superior hygiene, durability, and operational efficiency. We design and install clean room wall and ceiling systems that meet ISO and GMP standards while supporting efficient workflow and contamination control.
process: Clean room layout planning and design
Selection of modular partition panels and accessories
Installation of wall, ceiling, doors, and viewing panels
Quality inspection, sealing, and performance testing
features: Clean Room Doors, Windows & Viewing Panels
Custom Layouts for Pharma, Healthcare & Electronics
details: We provide complete clean room partition solutions designed to maintain controlled environments for industries where hygiene and contamination control are critical. Our modular partition systems are manufactured using high-quality insulated panels and precision-engineered components, ensuring excellent thermal insulation, durability, and airtight performance. From design and material selection to installation and validation, we deliver clean room solutions that comply with ISO, GMP, and industry-specific standards while enhancing operational efficiency and product quality.

title: Industrial Flooring (Epoxy, PU Flooring & More)
description: Specialized industrial flooring solutions including Epoxy, Polyurethane (PU), ESD, anti-skid, and heavy-duty flooring systems for manufacturing plants, warehouses, pharmaceuticals, food processing units, healthcare facilities, and commercial spaces.
overview: Our Industrial Flooring services deliver durable, seamless, and high-performance flooring systems designed to withstand heavy traffic, chemical exposure, abrasion, and demanding industrial environments. We provide complete design, surface preparation, application, and quality assurance to ensure long-lasting performance and minimal maintenance.
process: Site inspection and floor condition assessment
Selection of the appropriate flooring system
Primer, base coat, and finish coat application
details: We provide end-to-end industrial flooring solutions for a wide range of industries, including pharmaceuticals, food processing, automotive, electronics, logistics, manufacturing, healthcare, and commercial facilities. Our expert team installs premium-quality Epoxy, Polyurethane (PU), ESD, and specialty flooring systems that offer exceptional durability, hygiene, chemical resistance, and aesthetic appeal. Every flooring solution is customized to meet operational requirements, safety regulations, and industry standards, ensuring long-term performance, easy maintenance, and maximum return on investment.

title: Water Treatment (RO) & Wastewater Treatment (ETP, STP, ZLD)
description: Complete design, engineering, procurement, installation, and commissioning of Water Treatment Plants (WTP), Reverse Osmosis (RO) Systems, Effluent Treatment Plants (ETP), Sewage Treatment Plants (STP), and Zero Liquid Discharge (ZLD) solutions for industrial, commercial, and municipal applications.
overview: Our Water Treatment & Wastewater Treatment services provide sustainable and efficient solutions for water purification, wastewater recycling, and environmental compliance. We design and execute customized treatment systems that optimize water usage, reduce operational costs, and ensure compliance with CPCB, SPCB, and international environmental standards.
process: Water quality assessment and project feasibility study
Plant fabrication, installation, and piping works
features: Turnkey EPC Solutions with AMC & O&M Support
details: We provide comprehensive EPC solutions for water and wastewater treatment plants across industries including pharmaceuticals, food & beverage, textiles, chemicals, power plants, healthcare, manufacturing, and commercial facilities. Our expertise covers RO systems, WTP, ETP, STP, and ZLD plants designed to maximize water recovery, minimize environmental impact, and ensure regulatory compliance. From concept and process engineering to installation, commissioning, automation, and long-term operation & maintenance, we deliver reliable, efficient, and sustainable water management solutions tailored to your specific requirements.

title: Facade Designing & Execution
description: Comprehensive facade design, engineering, fabrication, and installation services for commercial, residential, industrial, hospitality, and institutional buildings, delivering aesthetically appealing, energy-efficient, and durable building exteriors.
overview: Our Facade Designing & Execution services combine architectural creativity with engineering excellence to create modern, high-performance building envelopes. We provide end-to-end solutions, from conceptual facade design and structural analysis to fabrication, installation, testing, and maintenance, ensuring superior aesthetics, safety, and long-term performance.
process: Site assessment and project requirement analysis
Conceptual facade design and material selection
Detailed engineering, structural analysis, and shop drawings
details: We deliver innovative facade solutions that enhance the visual appeal, energy efficiency, and structural performance of buildings. Our experienced architects and engineers design and execute curtain walls, structural glazing, ACP cladding, aluminium facade systems, and custom architectural exteriors using premium materials and advanced engineering techniques. Every facade is designed to withstand environmental conditions while providing thermal insulation, weather resistance, natural lighting, and long-term durability. From concept to completion, we ensure quality craftsmanship, regulatory compliance, and timely project delivery.

title: Pollution Air Control Systems
description: Complete design, engineering, supply, installation, and commissioning of air pollution control systems for industrial and commercial facilities, ensuring clean emissions, regulatory compliance, and sustainable operations.
overview: Our Pollution Air Control services provide advanced solutions to monitor, capture, filter, and control industrial air pollutants. We design customized air pollution control systems that improve workplace air quality, reduce environmental impact, and ensure compliance with CPCB, SPCB, and international environmental standards.
process: Site inspection and emission source assessment
Air quality analysis and system design
features: Complete Turnkey Air Pollution Control Solutions
details: We provide end-to-end Air Pollution Control solutions for manufacturing plants, power plants, cement industries, pharmaceuticals, food processing, foundries, steel plants, chemical industries, and other industrial facilities. Our experienced engineers design and implement efficient dust collection, gas cleaning, fume extraction, and emission control systems that improve workplace safety, reduce environmental pollution, and comply with applicable environmental regulations. From engineering and equipment selection to installation, commissioning, and long-term maintenance, we deliver reliable, energy-efficient, and sustainable pollution control solutions.

title: Green Building Solutions
description: Sustainable green building design, engineering, and execution services that enhance energy efficiency, conserve natural resources, reduce environmental impact, and create healthier, high-performance buildings.
overview: Our Green Building Solutions integrate sustainable design principles, energy-efficient technologies, and environmentally responsible construction practices to deliver buildings that are efficient, cost-effective, and future-ready. We assist clients throughout the entire project lifecycle, from planning and certification to execution and performance optimization.
process: Energy modeling and green building design
Selection of eco-friendly materials and technologies
Water conservation and renewable energy integration
Green building certification support and project handover
features: IGBC, GRIHA & LEED Green Building Consultancy
details: We provide comprehensive Green Building Solutions that combine innovative engineering with sustainable construction practices to create environmentally responsible buildings. Our services include energy-efficient architectural planning, optimized MEP systems, renewable energy integration, water management, sustainable material selection, and support for IGBC, GRIHA, and LEED certifications. Whether it's a residential, commercial, industrial, healthcare, or institutional project, we help clients reduce operating costs, minimize carbon emissions, improve occupant well-being, and achieve long-term sustainability goals.
